system_overview.name: MCP Server (Master Content Processor)
system_overview.purpose: Centralized indexing and retrieval system for ArcGIS/QGIS documentation with high-performance search capabilities
system_overview.architecture: Three-tier system: Content Ingestion → Intelligent Indexing → Smart Retrieval

mcp_server.description: High-performance search engine that stores and indexes all titles and links, providing fast query responses

advantages: Continuous improvement via data crawling and re-indexing

implementation_options.technology: Azure Cognitive Search with AI Embeddings
Pinecone or FAISS for Vector Storage

sdk_layer.description: Programming interface that facilitates communication between the application and the MCP Server

implementation_options.technology: Elasticsearch-Python SDK or Official Node SDK

skills_framework.description: Configurable modules that add functionality like entity extraction, classification, question answering, and learning from conversations

entity_extraction_skill.purpose: Extract keywords and entities from titles and content
entity_extraction_skill.implementation: NER (Named Entity Recognition) models for identifying technical terms, version numbers, API names, etc.

summarization_skill.purpose: Summarize content when titles have longer descriptive text
summarization_skill.implementation: Text summarization algorithms to condense lengthy descriptions

user_profile_skill.purpose: Determine user interests in specific categories to customize search results
user_profile_skill.implementation: User behavior analysis and preference tracking
user_profile_skill.output: Personalized search ranking based on user profile

learning_skill.purpose: Store new queries and their results within the MCP Server for future reference
learning_skill.implementation: Query-result correlation and feedback loop mechanisms

llm_rag_integration.description: Integration of knowledge base with AI models for question answering

implementation_options.technology: LangChain or LlamaIndex with GPT-4.6 Turbo
advantages: Combines traditional indexing with semantic search
Blends textual analysis with intelligence for more accurate answers

step_1_reading.description: Reads files or web pages containing documentation

step_2_extraction.description: Extracts title, text, and links from the content

step_1_vector_conversion.description: Converts paragraphs and titles to vectors using NER-trained models

step_2_database_insertion.description: Inserts title, text, link, and vector into MCP Server

traditional_search.keyword_matching: Exact and fuzzy matching on titles and content
traditional_search.hierarchical_filtering: Filter results by documentation level or category
traditional_search.version_control: Return results matching specific software versions

semantic_search.meaning_based_matching: Find content based on meaning rather than exact keywords
semantic_search.contextual_understanding: Consider surrounding context for better relevance
semantic_search.cross_domain_linking: Connect related concepts across different documentation sets

result_ranking.relevance_scoring: Combine keyword matching, semantic similarity, and metadata
result_ranking.personalization: Adjust results based on user profile and preferences
result_ranking.freshness_factor: Consider content update frequency in scoring

existing_architecture_alignment.ai_agent_layer_integration: Connect MCP Server to the 25 specialized AI agents
existing_architecture_alignment.computation_engine_enhancement: Provide contextual documentation for engineering calculations
existing_architecture_alignment.gis_integration_support: Supply detailed ArcGIS/QGIS documentation for GIS-enabled analysis

api_endpoints.description: Search documentation with natural language query
Add new content to the MCP Server
Retrieve related links based on current context

security_measures: Input validation to prevent injection attacks

continuous_learning.feedback_integration: Incorporate user interactions to improve search relevance
continuous_learning.content_refresh_cycles: Regularly update indexes with new documentation versions
continuous_learning.query_pattern_analysis: Identify common search patterns to optimize indexing

quality_assurance.link_validation: Verify all indexed URLs are still accessible
quality_assurance.content_accuracy: Ensure indexed content matches source documentation
quality_assurance.performance_monitoring: Track response times and search accuracy metrics
